VCF2Dis
=======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which VCF2Dis installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using VCF2Dis, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load VCF2Dis/1.55-foss-2024a-R-4.4.2
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
